      "url": "https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/28/ibms_ai_coding_partner_bob/",
      "title": "IBM's AI coding 'partner' Bob hits general availability - The Register",
      "content": "Science28 Apr 2026 | 4\n\n#### Vintage chatbot lives in the past like an elderly relative\n\nTalkie's training data stops at the end of 1930, and its creators hope it'll help us better understand how AI thinks\n\nAI + ML28 Apr 2026 | 1\n\n#### Why flexibility will define the future of functionality\n\nEnterprise infrastructure choices shouldn't have to be hostages to compromise. Cisco FlashStack with Nutanix sets out to break the deadlock\n\nSponsored Feature\n\n#### Amazon unveils a Copilot for all your apps\n\nRetailer touts 'teammates' and always-on context as it muscles into an already crowded enterprise market\n\nAI + ML28 Apr 2026 | 1\n\n#### Have I Been Pwned claims Pitney Bowes hit by 8.2M email address leak\n\nNames, phone numbers, physical addresses also included in Shiny Hunters alleged data dump [...] What’s a Bobcoin? About 50 cents, apparently.\n\nGitHub recently reworked its Copilot pricing after concluding that more complex prompts were losing it money. Given that Bob’s raison d’etre is more complex requests from the get go, it will be interesting to see how Bob fixes that particular conundrum.\n\nKate Holterhoff, senior industry analyst at RedMonk, said one differentiator for Bob was its multi-modal approach, with the platform choosing the best model.\n\n“This is a double edged sword, as developers can be suspicious of black box tools, but it also eliminates the paralysis of choice that comes from switching models between tasks.”\n\nShe added, “This may be a path forward as vendors like GitHub are forced to change billing structures to absorb the high cost of running these models.” [...] Cyber-crime28 Apr 2026 | 3\n\n#### Despite proposed science cuts, NASA boss says 'We haven't canceled anything yet'\n\nThat 'yet' is sure doing a lot of heavy lifting if the budget for science is slashed\n\nScience28 Apr 2026 | 18\n\n#### Tenstorrent’s Galaxy Blackhole AI servers escape the event horizon\n\nRISC-V-based systems pack 32 Blackhole accelerators in a 6U, $110K chassis\n\nAI + ML28 Apr 2026 | 3\n\n#### Brussels orders Google to share Android's AI sandbox with the other kids\n\nDMA enforcers want rival assistants to get same deep device access as Gemini\n\nAI + ML28 Apr 2026 | 5\n\n#### UK.gov's DCMS to new CDIO: Migrate from Google to Microsoft, overhaul ERP, build a team\n\n£125k and a pension await whoever can herd 6 departments onto single platform without losing will to live",

      "url": "https://www.pwc.com/us/en/careers/university-relations/faculty-newsletter/april-2026.html",
      "title": "PwC faculty newsletter - April 2026",
      "content": "### PwC named 2026 CIO 100 award winner\n\nPwC is proud to be named a 2026 CIO 100 Award winner for our innovative work with PwC’s agent OS, our enterprise operating system for AI agents. Presented by Foundry’s CIO, the award recognizes organizations that translate technology innovation into measurable business impact at scale. With agent OS, PwC has deployed thousands of AI agents across workflows – reducing manual effort, accelerating delivery and embedding governance at scale. This recognition underscores how we are driving enterprise-wide transformation through AI. Learn more here.\n\n### Storytelling in the Age of AI [...] Dear Friends in Academia,\n\nThis month’s update highlights the newly released recording of our faculty webinar “Teaching Accounting in the Age of AI: Practical Applications for the Classroom,” along with PwC’s recognition by Fortune as one of the 2026 “100 Best Companies to Work For” and a CIO 100 Award win for our AI-powered agent OS. We also feature the PwC Foundation’s $2 million investment in advancing human skills, new insights on workforce hopes and fears, and thought leadership on storytelling as a critical driver of AI adoption. We hope these selected resources provide practical support and fresh perspective.\n\n### Recording - Teaching Accounting in the Age of AI: Practical Applications for the Classroom [...] ### Workforce Hopes and Fears Survey: US insights\n\nAI isn’t just changing how work gets done—it’s reshaping how people feel about work. PwC’s Workforce Hopes & Fears Survey shows employees are more excited than anxious about AI—yet daily GenAI use remains low. Learn how HR leaders play a key role in AI adoption based on our Workforce Hopes & Fears Survey.\n\n### AI-ready skills go beyond prompting\n\nA recent Computerworld article featuring PwC’s Margaret Burke explores why AI readiness is less about mastering tools and more about building human skills like critical thinking, judgment, and storytelling alongside AI fluency. Learn more here.\n\n### New PwC survey explores what separates companies that keep pace from those that pull ahead",
      "score": 0.07359648,
      "raw_content": null

    {
      "url": "https://www.pwc.com/us/en/about-us/newsroom/press-releases/pwc-appian-expand-alliance.html",
      "title": "PwC and Appian expand alliance for enterprise AI",
      "content": "Across industries, thousands of business-critical processes—rate filings, financial close, risk and controls documentation, tax workflows, approval chains—run on spreadsheets and other end-user computing (EUC) files that sit outside IT governance and beyond the reach of enterprise AI. PwC’s document extraction capabilities apply multimodal AI reasoning to navigate and interpret large, enterprise-scale workbooks—tracing logic across sheets, surfacing embedded business rules, and producing structured, traceable requirements that feed directly into Appian Composer. Early pilots have compressed the initial application planning phase from 80 hours to 5, moving EUC processes off the desktop and into governed applications that compliance teams can audit and AI agents can safely operate within. [...] These solutions demonstrate what it looks like when AI is applied directly to the systems and processes that run the enterprise, transforming fragmented logic into governed, production-ready applications, not just maintaining existing systems, but accelerating innovation.\n\n### Labeling and product information management [...] “Appian Composer was built to close the gap between the complexity of what enterprises actually run and the speed at which they need to modernize,” said Scott Van Valkenburgh, Senior Vice President, Global Partners & Channels, Appian. “PwC’s doc extraction capability brings exactly the kind of structured, business-grounded input that enables Composer to do its best work. Together, we’re giving organizations a clear, credible path from the spreadsheets running their business today to the governed, agentic applications they need for tomorrow.”",
      "score": 0.060246922,
      "raw_content": null
    },

      "url": "https://apps.adp.com/en-US/apps/436030/immediate-connector-for-adp-vantage-hcm/features",
      "title": "Features | Immediate Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace",
      "content": "### Data Fields:\n\n## Commitment to Responsible AI\n\nTogether with ADP Marketplace, our company is committed to the responsible use of AI. When incorporating AI into our product(s), we have agreed to comply with ADP Marketplace's AI principles focused on human oversight, monitoring, privacy, explainability, transparency, and mitigating bias. Learn more here.\n\n## Immediate Connect\n\nImmediate is able to connect across platforms. Regardless of your time tracking or payroll system, Immediate can easily integrate through ADP Vantage HCM®. We take the entire technical process off of your hands to enable real-time data to flow into the ImmediatePay app. [...] ## Integration Details\n\nThe Immediate application integrates with ADP to provide earned wage access to your employees. This is a real-time integration that pushes the details to and from the Immediate platform and integrates the data in and out of ADP Vantage HCM.  \n  \nThe Immediate integration fully automates bringing your employee census and time data to the Immediate platform in real time. Once your pay period closes the Immediate platform writes back payroll deductions to the ADP system so that it fits seamlessly into your payroll workflow.\n\n### ADP Applications Integrated:\n\n### Integration Type:\n\n### Application Type:\n\n### Data Sync Frequency:\n\n### Data Fields:\n\n## Commitment to Responsible AI [...] ### Please agree to the app's terms of service You must accept these terms to begin your free trial.\n\n## Immediate Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®\n\n### Please agree to the app's terms of service You must accept these terms to begin your free trial.\n\n## \n\n# Immediate Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®\n\n### Please agree to the app's terms of service You must accept these terms to begin your free trial.\n\n## Immediate Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®\n\n## Integration Details",
      "score": 0.6551821,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://apps.adp.com/en-US/apps/245343/ClearCompany%20Connector%20for%20ADP%20Vantage%20HCM%C2%AE/features",
      "title": "Features | ClearCo Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace",
      "content": "## A Unified Talent Experience\n\nThe ADP Vantage HCM integration supports the full ClearCo talent platform—connecting hiring, onboarding, learning, and performance with payroll data for a more complete view of your workforce.\n\n### Clarity for every stage of the talent lifecycle.\n\n## Commitment to Responsible AI\n\nTogether with ADP Marketplace, our company is committed to the responsible use of AI. When incorporating AI into our product(s), we have agreed to comply with ADP Marketplace’s AI principles focused on human oversight, monitoring, privacy, explainability, transparency, and mitigating bias. Learn more here. [...] ## Connected Workforce Insights\n\nCombine payroll and talent data to unlock deeper workforce insights. With aligned information across systems, HR teams can better analyze workforce trends, monitor turnover drivers, and support strategic talent decisions.\n\n## New Hire Payroll Sync\n\nNew hires created in ClearCo automatically transfer to ADP Vantage HCM, allowing payroll teams to quickly set up employees with the necessary payroll and direct deposit information.\n\n## Employee Lifecycle Updates\n\nChanges such as promotions, department moves, compensation updates, or terminations automatically sync between ClearCo and ADP Vantage HCM, reducing administrative work and ensuring employee records remain consistent.\n\n## A Unified Talent Experience [...] ## Single Sign-On (SSO)\n\nEmployees can securely access ClearCo using their ADP credentials, creating a seamless login experience while maintaining strong identity and access controls.\n\n## Bulk Employee Imports\n\nQuickly bring existing employee records from ADP Vantage HCM into ClearCo. Data fields align across systems to establish an accurate organizational structure without manual data entry.\n\n## Flexible User Access Controls\n\nControl who can access ClearCo by managing user assignments through ADP. Grant access to specific employees or extend platform visibility across your organization as needed.\n\n## Connected Workforce Insights",
      "score": 0.6538572,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://apps.adp.com/en-US/apps/422696/tapcheck-earned-wage-access-for-adp-vantage-hcm/features",
      "title": "Features | Tapcheck Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace",
      "content": "### Applications Integrated\n\n### Application Type\n\n### Integration Type\n\n### Data Sync Frequency\n\n### Data Fields\n\n## Commitment to Responsible AI\n\nTogether with ADP Marketplace, our company is committed to the responsible use of AI. When incorporating AI into our product(s), we have agreed to comply with ADP Marketplace’s AI principles focused on human oversight, monitoring, privacy, explainability, transparency, and mitigating bias. Learn more here.\n\n### How we use AI\n\n## High Precision Earned Wage Access Payouts [...] ## Payroll-based Recovery\n\nThe total amount an employee transfers in a pay period will be automatically deducted from their next paycheck via a payroll-based deduction. Employees can see this deduction on their pay stubs and in the Tapcheck app, while employers can view it in ADP's payroll register and the Tapcheck admin dashboard. This creates a clear reconciliation process compared to other solutions that recover funds outside of payroll, which often creates confusion and perceived inaccuracies for both employees and employers. [...] Tapcheck Earned Wage Access integrates seamlessly with ADP Vantage HCM, giving your employees secure, on-demand access to wages they’ve already earned—without changing how you run payroll.   \n  \nThis real-time, automated integration securely exchanges payroll and hours-worked data to calculate accurate earned wage balances. Employees can instantly access their pay through Tapcheck’s highly-rated mobile app, while all activity syncs back to ADP and appears clearly on payroll registers and employee paystubs. You maintain full visibility and transparency at every step.",
      "score": 0.63939893,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://apps.adp.com/en-US/apps/235219/absorb-connector-for-adp-vantage-hcm/features",
      "title": "Absorb Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace",
      "content": "Title: Absorb Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace\nhttps://d3bql97l1ytoxn.cloudfront.net/app_resources/235219/thumbs_112/img233328591341702560.png. https://d3bql97l1ytoxn.cloudfront.net/app_resources/235219/thumbs_112/img233328591341702560.png. https://d3bql97l1ytoxn.cloudfront.net/app_resources/235219/thumbs_112/img233328591341702560.png. # Absorb Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®. ## Integration Details. The turnkey Absorb LMS integration for ADP Vantage HCM® connects human resources (HR) and training data to provide all the benefits and function of a software suite. Automate menial—but time-consuming—tasks like data entry, record keeping and training enrollment to save both time and money. Connect employees to the learning materials needed to ensure their success—and yours. ### ADP Applications Integrated. ### Integration Type. ### Application Type. ### Data Sync Frequency. ### Data Fields. ## Commitment to Responsible AI. Together with ADP Marketplace, our company is committed to the responsible use of AI. When incorporating AI into our product(s), we have agreed to comply with ADP Marketplace’s AI principles focused on human oversight, monitoring, privacy, explainability, transparency, and mitigating bias. ## Automatic Worker Sync. Easy to set up & highly customizable integration for your employees in ADP Vantage HCM®. ### Eliminate administrative overhead. ### Flexible sync options. ### Ensure appropriate access levels.",

    {
      "url": "https://apps.adp.com/en-US/apps/352947/hcm-tradeseal-for-adp-workforce-now/features",
      "title": "HCM TradeSeal for ADP Workforce Now® | ADP Marketplace",
      "content": "HCM TradeSeal for ADP Workforce Now®. Solve unions, prevailing wage, fringes plus Certified Payroll. HCM TradeSeal for ADP Workforce Now®. # HCM TradeSeal for ADP Workforce Now®. Solve unions, prevailing wage, fringes plus Certified Payroll. * Certified Payroll and Union Remittance Reporting. * Data Management, Rate & Benefit Behaviors. HCM TradeSeal integrates with the current version of ADP Workforce Now®, featuring bi-directional file based integration with HR and payroll data, as well as available time import and General Ledger integration. Together with ADP Marketplace, our company is committed to the responsible use of AI. * Our AI-assisted workflows help set up union and prevailing wage rate rules on behalf of our clients. After you submit your union rate or prevailing wage determinations to us, our AI allows us to scan and pull information quickly from the information that you submit. If you have questions about how HCM TradeSeal uses AI, please contact us. ## Certified Payroll and Union Remittance Reporting. Streamline your certified payroll and union remittance reporting. * Unlimited Certified Payroll and Union Remittance Reporting Reports in PDF format. * Upload available for Certified Payroll and Union reporting, including LCP Tracker. * Customize page 2, Fringes & remarks page of Certified Payroll reports. HCM TradeSeal is available in three different tiers, Basic, Standard & Enterprise. * Enterprise: Up to 100 EIN/Payroll Ids, 600+employees, and unlimited end users. * Standard: Up to 5 EIN/Payroll IDs, up to 599 employees, and up to 10 end users. * Basic: 1 EIN/Payroll ID Supported, up to 149 employees, and up to 5 end users. * And additional custom time import is available in our Enterprise tier. * Easy to use Time and Cost Entry Screen for entering or editing data. * Up to 3 scheduled Zoom trainings during set-up (Standard & Enterprise editions). * Data manager training (Standard & Enterprise editions). * Kick-off call with our team (Standard & Enterprise editions). * Up to 3 scheduled Zoom Go-Live Support calls to support your payroll-go live (Standard & Enterprise editions). Get ongoing support from the HCM TradeSeal Team. This includes email support, standard response times, and accelerated response times for urgent issues (Standard & Enterprise editions).",

      "raw_content": null

      "title": "iCIMS Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace",
      "content": "Title: iCIMS Connector for ADP Vantage HCM® | ADP Marketplace\niCIMS Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®. Bidirectional integration between iCIMS and ADP®. iCIMS Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®. # iCIMS Connector for ADP Vantage HCM®. Bidirectional integration between iCIMS and ADP®. The iCIMS Connector for ADP Vantage HCM will automatically create new employees in ADP using data from new hire records from iCIMS’ Talent Cloud and automatically sync employee profiles in ADP Vantage HCM with person profiles in iCIMS. ### ADP Applications Integrated. Export your newly hired candidates to ADP Vantage HCM. ### New Hire: Data Fields. * **The following fields will be sent from iCIMS to ADP:**. ### Data Fields: Employee Sync. * **The following fields will be read by iCIMS:**. * Configurability up to 25 field changes and/or additions. * To learn more about the iCIMS integration with ADP, please read our documentation available on the iCIMS community site. Together with ADP Marketplace, our company is committed to the responsible use of AI. Import foundational data from ADP Vantage HCM® to create and maintain fields and instances from ADP within iCIMS. * Many fields from iCIMS are required to be populated to support a pre-hire process in ADP. iCIMS will ensure that lists of code/labels are being integrated daily from ADP Vantage HCM to iCIMS. For the above Lookups/Lists, no other attributes of these tables are supported via the APIs for ADP Vantage HCM. Import employee data from ADP Vantage HCM® to iCIMS to provision and maintain client defined roles and properties within iCIMS. * With this integration, you can eliminate the need to manually add or upload employees into iCIMS ATS. When the integration runs, all employees are automatically transferred to iCIMS with the appropriate level of access as defined by their roles. Export your newly hired candidates to ADP Vantage HCM® as a pre-hire or hire. * This synchronization process is used to send hired candidates from iCIMS to ADP as pre-hired or hired candidates. Export of all fields is required prior to synchronization within the ADP Vantage HCM environment. With this integration, candidates for hire in iCIMS are transferred to ADP Vantage HCM by changing the workflow status in iCIMS to automatically transmit the selected candidate to ADP.",

    {
      "url": "https://www.servicenow.com/ai.html",
      "title": "ServiceNow AI - Put AI to Work for People",
      "content": "Empower self-service, boost agent productivity, and speed up resolution.\n ### Strategic Portfolio Management\n\n  Gain insights to move from strategy to business outcomes.\n ### IT Asset Management\n\n  Improve technology use and spend over the IT asset lifecycle.\n ### Governance, Risk, and Compliance\n\n  Enable an integrated approach that builds operational resilience and mitigates risk.\n ### Security Operations\n\n  Defend against security threats and attacks.\n ### Field Service Management\n\n  Reduce field service costs and improve efficiency.\n ### HR Service Delivery\n\n  Give employees instant answers, guidance, and fast issue resolution.\n ### EmployeeWorks\n\n  Stop chasing what other AI tools should have finished.\n\n### Meet the Autonomous Workforce [...] An AI agent is an autonomous system designed to gather data, make decisions, and execute tasks to achieve predefined goals. It adapts to new information, learns over time, and can manage a wide range of tasks, from simple repetitive actions to complex problem-solving. ServiceNow AI Agents, powered by the ServiceNow AI Platform, automate workflows, streamline operations, and adapt to diverse business needs across IT, HR, CRM, and more. With features like built-in governance, analytics, and text-to-action capabilities, they enhance productivity while aiding alignment with organizational goals\n\n    How is ServiceNow's approach to AI different from other vendors? [...] Reduce third-party risk while improving resilience and compliance.\n ### Security Posture Control\n\n  Manage the security of enterprise assets on premises and in the cloud.\n ### Privacy Management\n\n  Manage data privacy in real time as part of a holistic enterprise risk program.\n\nEmployee Experience\n\nAutomate the busywork, so that you can unleash your talent on the big work.\n\nExplore Solution\n\nRelated Products\n\n ### HR Service Delivery\n\n  Give employees instant answers, guidance, and fast issue resolution.\n ### Talent Development\n\n  Make AI and skills-driven talent planning and development decisions.\n ### Legal Service Delivery\n\n  Modernize operations to make faster decisions and grow productivity.\n ### Workplace Service Delivery",
      "score": 0.7348247,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.servicenow.com/uk/blogs/2026/how-is-servicenow-using-ai-agents",
      "title": "How Is ServiceNow Using AI Agents?",
      "content": "The results have been transformative: AI agents now handle 90% of employee IT support requests, with 96% resolution efficiency. This shift has allowed us to redeploy 85% of our human IT support agents to higher-value work, such as innovating ways to serve employees across HR, finance, and customer support.\n\nThe remaining 15% of human agents working on the service desk have been upskilled to manage AI agents, support the most complex cases, and provide VIP support. They use the ServiceNow AI Platform to see what fixes have been executed, monitor ongoing cases, and action tasks that require their input.\n\n### 4. Accelerate software request fulfilment [...] Thanks to multi-agent collaboration, people gain faster access to the software they need, and teams can recover unused licences to maximise financial resources. This helps ensure all employees have access to the right software for their role at the right time. And by automating repetitive handoffs, IT teams have capacity to focus on higher-value tasks, such as proactively researching new tools.\n\nAt ServiceNow, we're using AI to improve productivity and experience. The real value is in the time it gives our people to do what they do best—strategising, relationship building, and innovating—so they can grow their skills and our business.\n\nFind out how ServiceNow can help you put AI agents to work for people. [...] # How is ServiceNow using AI agents?\n\nBusinessman dressed smart casual using smart phone while working from laptop\n\nAI agents can help organisations speed up processes, boost productivity, and enhance customer experiences. At ServiceNow, we build and deploy these autonomous workers in every corner of our business.\n\nServiceNow AI Agents use workflows, scripts, and knowledge base articles to perform complex tasks across the organisation. In total, they support 400,000 workflows each year, freeing 3 million hours of capacity for our people and driving an estimated $0.5 billion annualised value.",
      "score": 0.7014069,
      "raw_content": null
    },

    {
      "url": "https://www.servicenow.com/de/events/knowledge/happening.html",
      "title": "What's Happening at Knowledge - Knowledge 2026 - ServiceNow",
      "content": "Zugehörige Produkte\n\n ### HR-Servicebereitstellung\n\n  Bieten Sie Mitarbeitern sofortige Antworten, Anleitungen und eine schnelle Problemlösung.\n ### Mitarbeiterentwicklung\n\n  Treffen Sie KI- und kompetenzorientierte Entscheidungen für die Talentplanung und Mitarbeiterentwicklung.\n ### Legal Service Delivery\n\n  Modernisieren Sie den Betrieb, um schnellere Entscheidungen zu treffen und die Produktivität zu steigern.\n ### Workplace Service Delivery\n\n  Automatisieren Sie Schreibtischbuchungen, verwalten Sie Einrichtungen, und optimieren Sie den Betrieb.\n ### Accounts Payable Operations\n\n  Automatisieren Sie die Rechnungseingabe, und gewährleisten Sie genaue Zahlungen an Lieferanten.\n ### Sourcing and Procurement Operations [...] Optimieren Sie die Nutzung und Kosten von IT-Assets über den gesamten Lebenszyklus hinweg.\n ### Governance, Risk und Compliance\n\n  Schaffen Sie einen integrierten Ansatz, der die organisationale Resilienz erhöht und Risiken mindert.\n ### Security Operations\n\n  Schützen Sie sich vor Sicherheitsbedrohungen und Angriffen.\n ### Außendienst-Management\n\n  Senken Sie die Außendienstkosten durch gesteigerte Effizienz.\n ### HR-Servicebereitstellung\n\n  Bieten Sie Mitarbeitern sofortige Antworten, Anleitungen und eine schnelle Problemlösung.\n ### EmployeeWorks\n\n  Die Zeiten sind vorbei, in denen Sie den Aufgaben hinterherjagen müssen, die andere KI-Tools hätten erledigen sollen.\n\n### Wir stellen vor: Autonomous Workforce [...] the Buyer Zones    Head straight to demos designed for your needs: customer relationship management, employee experience, IT, security & risk, you name it.     Video CTA        Dive into your industry and uncover real use cases    You can easily explore how AI agents work within your actual workflows across banking, healthcare, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, retail, and more.     Video CTA        Next-gen breakthroughs    See the future take shape. Take prototypes for a test drive, compete in the Hackathon, and get an insider look at product innovations at the keynote.     Video CTA",
      "score": 0.4352539,

    {
      "url": "https://www.servicenow.com/uk/blogs/2026/4-best-practices-ai-risk-management",
      "title": "4 Best Practices for AI Risk Management",
      "content": "With defined roles, AI agents can work together to support complex, multi-step workflows. ServiceNow AI Agent Orchestrator coordinates teams of specialised agents across tasks, systems, and departments to work towards common goals and drive productivity at scale.\n\n### 3. Take small, controlled steps\n\nWhen leaders ask AI consultants whether they should go full speed ahead with a list of new AI use cases, the answer is usually no. The safest way to realise value from AI is to enhance core processes rather than pursue new use cases without the experience to govern them. [...] The role of a machine learning engineer, for instance, is to make sure that AI delivers the intended outcomes without making mistakes. If an error does occur, the engineer should help ensure it doesn’t negatively impact the business. This makes it critical to collect and review AI outputs while still adhering to data regulations.\n\nServiceNow AI Control Tower is the enterprise control and governance plane for AI, helping teams discover, manage, and measure AI systems in compliance with regulations. It enables real-time monitoring, generates audit-ready compliance evidence, and triggers governance remediation workflows to drive end-to-end risk reduction.\n\n### 2. Give AI systems distinct roles [...] # 4 best practices for AI risk management\n\nThe role of the chief risk officer is expanding to encompass AI compliance, privacy, and security. Organisations are embedding AI agents into the fabric of work, making effective AI risk management imperative.\n\nBusiness leaders met at Nexus 2026—ServiceNow’s risk, security, and AI governance event for executive leaders in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)—to discuss how to safely innovate with AI. We explored practical ways to reduce risk, improve efficiency, and stay compliant with evolving regulations.\n\nHere are four best practices for AI risk management, based on our discussions on the day.\n\n### 1. Monitor AI actions",

    },

      "url": "https://apply.deloitte.com/en_US/careers/JobDetail/ServiceNow-Moveworks-Senior-Consultant-IT-Platform-Integration/340399",
      "title": "ServiceNow – Moveworks Senior Consultant (IT &amp; Platform Integration) -  - 340399",
      "content": "Recruiting for this role ends on May 31, 2026\n\nWork You’ll Do \n\nOur ServiceNow practice is expanding its AI and automation capabilities following ServiceNow’s acquisition of Moveworks, ushering in a new era of agentic AI-driven enterprise workflows. As organizations move beyond experimentation with AI toward large-scale, production-ready solutions, Deloitte is investing in talent who can architect, integrate, and operationalize these capabilities across complex IT environments. [...] This role focuses on the IT and platform-centric implementationofMoveworks within the ServiceNow ecosystem, emphasizing deep workflow orchestration, integrations, and end-to-end solution architecture. You will work with CIOs, IT leaders, and platform owners to design and deliver AI-powered experiences that automate real IT use cases—turning employee requests into completed work across enterprise systems. \n\nAs a ServiceNow – Moveworks Senior Consultant (IT & Platform Integration), you will: \n\nThe team\n\nEvery business needs a strategic cloud integration platform. Our team helps organizations create strategies and implement systems to enhance value and boost performance. Our experts have global experience with complex IT challenges, from system upgrades to full transformations. [...] ### Position Summary\n\nOur ServiceNow team works with clients to transform their technology services and operations. We partner with CIOs, tech executives, and service owners (HR, IT, Customer, Field Service, Project Portfolio Management) and their teams to create a future-ready operating model. Our focus is on NextGen tech, new service models, and meeting the operational needs of an organization.\n\nLooking for a job with diverse opportunities and cool tech solutions? Join our team! We're looking for enthusiastic people ready to help transform enterprise services and tech operations. Your skills and excitement can drive meaningful change and deliver great value to our clients. Apply now and be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization!\n\nRecruiting for this role ends on May 31, 2026",
      "score": 0.23340958,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://careers.servicenow.com/jobs/744000123547539/people-operations-specialist/",
      "title": "People Operations Specialist, West Palm Beach | ServiceNow Careers",
      "content": "As a People Operations Specialist, you will play a crucial role in supporting and streamlining the employee journey on a global scale. You will build rapport, research and provide timely information about Global People processes and policies in the moments that matter, and help elevate the Global People Operations HR service and delivery capabilities.\n\nKey responsibilities:\n\nWhat are we looking for:\n\nTo excel in this role, you should demonstrate the following:\n\n### Qualifications\n\nRequired Qualifications:\n\n### Additional Information\n\nWork Personas [...] What you get to do in this role:\n\nOur Global People Care team makes the world of work, work better for our employees. Using our own technology, we deliver an engaging employee experience, providing support to employees and managers across 27 countries. Partnering closely with our HR Business Partners and Centers of Excellence we create a strong and effective cross-functional team. We learn from our employees’ interactions with us, and constantly evolve and enhance our service delivery. [...] # People Operations Specialist\n\n### Company Description\n\nIt all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.\n\n### Job Description",

    {
      "url": "https://www.deloitte.com/lu/en/our-thinking/future-of-advice/the-ai-paradox.html",
      "title": "The AI paradox: Why your data foundation matters most | Deloitte Luxembourg",
      "content": "In an AI-augmented environment, intelligent agents can interpret business intent, connect requests to governed semantic definitions, identify and profile relevant data sources, detect quality issues, and recommend remediation strategies informed by historical knowledge. They can assist in constructing or adapting data pipelines with embedded controls and even generate an initial dataset or analytical output to accelerate validation and alignment. Activities that once required extended manual effort can therefore be reduced from weeks to hours. [...] Ultimately, organizations will succeed with AI only if their data foundations operate at AI speed. Strong data enables effective AI, which in turn enhances and accelerates those foundations. This makes scalable, trusted, and adaptive data platforms essential for scaling AI.\n\n#### Introduction\n\nAI is steadily transitioning from experimentation into operational use, with organizations embedding chatbots, copilots, and intelligent automation into customer journeys, internal processes, and decision-making workflows across industries. Some of these initiatives are already delivering measurable value by improving service quality, increasing efficiency, and enabling new forms of interaction. [...] deloitte_logo\ndeloitte_logo\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Together makes progress\n\n### Our history\n\n### Generative AI services\n\n### Operate services\n\n### Generative AI services\n\n### Operate services\n\n### Generative AI services\n\n### Operate services\n\n### Generative AI services\n\n### Operate services\n\n### Future of Advice Blog\n\n### Deloitte AI Institute Luxembourg\n\n### Future of Advice Blog\n\n### Deloitte AI Institute Luxembourg\n\n### Future of Advice Blog\n\n### Deloitte AI Institute Luxembourg\n\n### Future of Advice Blog",

      "title": "Workday Data Cloud: Enterprise Data Management & Analytics",
      "content": "### Go all in on agentic AI—simply and securely.\n\nWorkday Data Cloud uses trusted people and finance data to power Workday Agents, partner agents, and your custom agents built on Workday Build.       "title": "Best Document Management Reviews 2026 | Gartner Peer Insights",
      "content": "Show More Details\n\nImage 26: Logo of Hyland OnBase\n### Hyland OnBase\n\nBy Hyland\n\n4.2\n\n(290 Ratings)\n\nOVERVIEW ALTERNATIVES\n\nOnBase provides a broad spectrum of turn-key industry and departmental solutions that are expertly\n\ntailored to meet specific business challenges. As an enterprise platform, OnBase has purpose-built\n\nintegrations and connectors to core industry LOB applications such as Epic and Workday, supporting\n\ncritical content and process solutions. With repeatable industry solutions, OnBase provides the\n\ncapability to intelligently automate your business processes so your team can focus on higher value\n\nwork without the need to build costly customized solutions. With business ownership of solutions,\n\nOnBase enables expansion beyond IT, delivering faster ROI.\n\nShow More Details [...] Doxis Intelligent Content Automation is an AI-powered content services platform designed to bridge and automate content across best-of-breed apps like SAP, Salesforce & Microsoft to deliver a contextualized content experience and a future-ready digital workplace. What’s inside: Composable and contextual AI to harness and disseminate hidden insights; cloud-native solution suites, e.g. Doxis Intelligent Purchase-to-Pay Automation, Doxis Content Bridge for SAP & Salesforce, Doxis Healthcare; in addition to easily configurable, custom content services applications, e.g. intelligent archiving, document management, workflow automation, contract management, HR, QM, invoice and order confirmation automation; and solutions for verticals like banking, healthcare, insurance, logistics, manufacturing [...] Software \n           Enterprise Agile Planning Tools \n           Integration Platform as a Service \n           AI-Augmented Software Testing Tools \n           View All \n\n       Artificial Intelligence   \n\n           AI Code Assistants (Transitioning to Enterprise AI Coding Agents) \n           AI Application Development Platforms \n           Generative AI Knowledge Management Apps/General Productivity \n           Artificial Intelligence Applications in IT Service Management (Transitioning to AI Applications in IT Service Management) \n           Conversational AI Platforms \n           View All \n\n       Cloud Computing",

      "title": "Build an integrated control platform, Empower Digital Transformation ...",
      "content": "### Generative AI\n\n### The Deloitte Global Boardroom Program\n\n### Generative AI\n\n### The Deloitte Global Boardroom Program\n\n### Generative AI\n\n### The Deloitte Global Boardroom Program\n\n### Generative AI\n\n### The Deloitte Global Boardroom Program\n\n### Generative AI\n\n### The Deloitte Global Boardroom Program\n\n### Generative AI\n\n### The Deloitte Global Boardroom Program\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\n### Our commitment to social responsibility\n\nSelect your location\n\nNo results found\n\n# Build an integrated control platform [...] ### Let's connect\n\n##### Follow us\n\nDeloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited, a UK private company limited by guarantee (\"DTTL\"), and its network of member firms, and their related entities. DTTL and each member firms are legally separate and independent entities. DTTL (also referred to as \"Deloitte Global\") does not provide services to clients. Please see About Deloitte to learn more about our global network of member firms.\n\n© 2026. For information, contact Deloitte China. [...] © 2026. For information, contact Deloitte China.\n\nDeloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited, a UK private company limited by guarantee (\"DTTL\"), and its network of member firms, and their related entities. DTTL and each member firms are legally separate and independent entities. DTTL (also referred to as \"Deloitte Global\") does not provide services to clients. Please see About Deloitte to learn more about our global network of member firms.\n\n© 2026. For information, contact Deloitte China.",
      "score": 0.08531997,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.deloitte.com/lu/en/our-thinking/future-of-advice/the-ai-paradox.html",
      "title": "The AI paradox: Why your data foundation matters most - Deloitte",
      "content": "The environment in which data must operate has evolved more rapidly than the foundations originally designed to support it. As a result, organizations may manage data well by traditional standards yet still struggle to scale AI.\n\n#### AI changes the nature of data foundations\n\nThe core disciplines of data management are not new. Data quality, governance, architecture, integration, and master data have long been critical to enterprise performance. What has fundamentally changed is the speed, scale, and autonomy with which AI systems now consume and generate data. [...] Ultimately, organizations will succeed with AI only if their data foundations operate at AI speed. Strong data enables effective AI, which in turn enhances and accelerates those foundations. This makes scalable, trusted, and adaptive data platforms essential for scaling AI.\n\n#### Introduction\n\nAI is steadily transitioning from experimentation into operational use, with organizations embedding chatbots, copilots, and intelligent automation into customer journeys, internal processes, and decision-making workflows across industries. Some of these initiatives are already delivering measurable value by improving service quality, increasing efficiency, and enabling new forms of interaction. [...] #### Conclusion\n\nThe long-term success of AI will not be determined solely by advances in algorithms or computational power. It will depend on the ability of organizations to transform their data foundations into adaptive, intelligent systems capable of operating continuously, securely, and at scale.\n\nScaling AI ultimately means scaling the data foundations beneath it. Today, AI itself provides the tools to accelerate this transformation, enabling organizations to evolve faster, operate more intelligently, and build sustainable trust in decisions powered by data and AI.\n\n### Discover our Future of Advice Blog Homepage\n\n### \n\n### Get in touch\n\nAli El Maghraoui\n\n#### Ali El Maghraoui\n\nNicolas Griedlich\n\n#### Nicolas Griedlich\n\nDid you find this useful?\n\n#### Thanks for your feedback",
      "score": 0.057013743,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.bain.com/insights/google_cloud_next_2026_the_agentic_enterprise_control_plane_comes_into_view/",
      "title": "Google Cloud Next 2026: The Agentic Enterprise Control Plane ...",
      "content": "The open ecosystem story remains important. Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform offers access to more than 200 models through Model Garden, including Gemini 3.1 Pro, Gemini 3.1 Flash Image, Lyria 3, Gemma 4, and third-party models such as Anthropic’s Claude. The partner layer expanded as well through Agent Gallery and partner-built agents from Accenture, Adobe, Atlassian, Oracle, Palo Alto Networks, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Workday, and others.\n\nBut the more interesting question is not whether Google is open. It is where Google is open. [...] Headshot of Dale Pedzinski\n\n##### Dale Pedzinski\n\n##### Expert Associate Partner, Dallas\n\n###### Related Consulting Services\n\n###### How We Can Help\n\n##### People and Organization\n\n###### Want More Out of Your AI Investments? Think People First\n\nTo unlock AI’s exponential productivity potential, companies must modernize workflow and workforce in tandem.\n\n##### CIO Insights\n\n###### The Rise of Autonomous, Intelligent Procurement\n\nEarly movers are redesigning procurement with agentic AI and pulling ahead.\n\n##### CIO Insights\n\n###### Tech Services Buyer Survey: Betting Big on AI and Resilience\n\nCompanies have moved beyond curiosity and now demand results and returns from their AI investment.\n\n##### CIO Insights\n\n###### Will IT Accelerate or Stall Your AI Transformation? [...] The implication is important. Google is no longer just saying enterprises can build agents on its platform. It is making the case that Google Cloud should be where enterprises operate an agentic workforce.\n\nReflecting on the conference, five themes stood out.\n\n### Google is building a control plane, not just adding more AI features\n\nThe individual launches matter, but the pattern matters more.",
      "score": 0.05589021,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.deloitte.com/us/en/services/deloitte-private/articles/ai-in-private-markets-survey.html",
      "title": "AI in Private Markets: Investment & ROI Survey | Deloitte US",
      "content": "# Key survey takeaways\n\nView full report\n\n\"Private companies are moving beyond AI experimentation and investing in it to drive growth, improve productivity, and make faster decisions,” said Wolfe Tone, vice chair and US Deloitte Private leader. “Many are starting to see returns, and continuing the momentum will depend on how they integrate AI across leadership, governance, and the workforce. Private companies have an advantage because they can often move with greater agility and align decisions more quickly, but realizing the full value of AI will depend on how effectively they translate that agility into disciplined execution at scale.\"  \nWolfe Tone, US Deloitte Private leader\n\n### About the survey [...] ### More money moving to AI and digital initiatives\n\nPerhaps unsurprisingly, many private companies are pointing to AI and digital investment as core near term priorities—and the pace of investment is accelerating. To better understand private companies’ views on AI for business, we asked 100 leaders from US private companies with annual revenues of $100 million to $1 billion+ about the approaches to (and expectations of) their digital initiatives. The answers reveal something of a maturity gap between higher and lower revenue private companies, including funding approaches, stage of adoption, digital transformation ROI, and using AI for decision making.  \n  \nDownload the full report to see all their responses. [...] © 2026. See Terms of Use for more information.\n\nDeloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited, a UK private company limited by guarantee (\"DTTL\"), its network of member firms, and their related entities.       "title": "Dell Technologies Solutions: Hybrid Infrastructure and AI | Deloitte US",
      "content": "#### Connected edge\n\n### Connected edge\n\nBring intelligence to the edge with AI-powered networking that enables ultra-low latency, real-time decision-making and seamless connectivity—critical for IoT, retail, manufacturing and distributed operations.\n\n### Modernizing retail with edge AI\n\nSee how edge AI is helping consumer organizations personalize experiences, enhance operations and modernize infrastructure by processing data where it is created. Together, Deloitte and Dell are integrating AI, edge computing, and real-time data to create frictionless experiences.\n\n## Let’s make this work.\n\nTo view this video, change your advertising and targeting cookie settings.\n\nManage cookie preferences\n\n### The forces reshaping enterprise infrastructure [...] deloitte_logo\ndeloitte_logo\n\n### Blockchain & Digital Assets\n\n### Blockchain & Digital Assets\n\n### Blockchain & Digital Assets\n\n### Blockchain & Digital Assets\n\n### Blockchain & Digital Assets\n\nSelect your location\n\nNo results found\n\nIf we have selected the wrong experience for you, please change it above.\n\n# Deloitte and Dell Technologies: Hybrid solutions for enterprise AI\n\n## Infrastructure built to scale with your AI ambitions\n\nBuild your capability to run high-performance, cost-effective AI while maintaining robust security and governance.\n\n### Contact us\n\nThe submission of personal information through this page is subject to Deloitte's Privacy Statement and Legal Terms. I have read and accept the terms of use.\n\n## Cloud agility. On-premise control. One hybrid platform. [...] #### Agentic AI\n\n### Agentic AI\n\nDeploy purpose-built AI within your private Dell infrastructure. With a multi-agent AI platform from Deloitte layered on your Dell infrastructure, you can move beyond individual tasks to automate complex, end-to-end workflows. Define, run, and monitor autonomous agents with human-in-the-loop oversight, leveraging our asset accelerator to keep AI systems operating safely and effectively.\n\n#### Hybrid cloud infrastructure\n\n### Hybrid cloud infrastructure\n\nScale with confidence from on-premises to the edge and into cloud. Deloitte’s hybrid infrastructure approach tailors workload requirements to data consumption patterns. By balancing security and scalability across compute, storage, and network, our solutions provide flexibility without sacrificing control.",

      "content": "### Financial planning.\n\nFlexible, AI-driven budgeting, scenario planning, and reporting let you plan, budget, and forecast with confidence.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Workforce planning.\n\nPlan for the skills you need today and tomorrow with flexible hiring plans that align finance, sales, HR, marketing, and IT.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Operational planning.\n\nCompanywide, collaborative planning and real-time data enable you to deploy the right resources to meet business goals.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Close and consolidation.\n\nStreamline close and consolidation tasks for more accuracy, transparency, and efficiency in your consolidation process.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Planning FAQs.\n\n### How quickly can Workday Adaptive Planning be deployed?     {
      "url": "https://www.deloitte.com/lu/en/our-thinking/future-of-advice/the-ai-paradox.html",
      "title": "The AI paradox: Why your data foundation matters most - Deloitte",
      "content": "Although governance, quality, and architecture are widely recognized as critical, many data investments still reflect pre-AI priorities such as compliance, reporting, or technology renewal. Meanwhile, AI changes how data is consumed through real-time, machine-driven decisions that require continuous quality, traceability, explainability, and secure access to both structured and unstructured information. AI can also accelerate data operations by interpreting business intent, locating and profiling data, detecting issues, and helping generate pipelines or analytical outputs, reducing work that once took weeks to hours while keeping humans responsible for intent and accountability. [...] © 2026. For information, contact Deloitte Global.\n\nDeloitte refers to one or more of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited (“DTTL”), its global network of member firms, and their related entities (collectively, the “Deloitte organization”). DTTL (also referred to as “Deloitte Global”) and each of its member firms and related entities are legally separate and independent entities, which cannot obligate or bind each other in respect of third parties. DTTL and each DTTL member firm and related entity is liable only for its own acts and omissions, and not those of each other. DTTL does not provide services to clients. Please see www.deloitte.com/about to learn more.\n\n© 2026. For information, contact Deloitte Global. [...] Ultimately, organizations will succeed with AI only if their data foundations operate at AI speed. Strong data enables effective AI, which in turn enhances and accelerates those foundations. This makes scalable, trusted, and adaptive data platforms essential for scaling AI.\n\n#### Introduction\n\nAI is steadily transitioning from experimentation into operational use, with organizations embedding chatbots, copilots, and intelligent automation into customer journeys, internal processes, and decision-making workflows across industries. Some of these initiatives are already delivering measurable value by improving service quality, increasing efficiency, and enabling new forms of interaction.",

{
  "query": "Workday AI",

  "results": [
    {
      "url": "https://en-gb.newsroom.workday.com/2026-04-28-SNG-Deploys-Workday-to-Transform-HR-and-Finance-Operations-and-Accelerate-Community-Impact",
      "title": "Workday Newsroom | WDAY Press Releases | Workday",
      "content": "LONDON, UK, April 29, 2026 – Workday Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, today announced that SNG (Sovereign Network Group)  has successfully deployed Workday Financial Management and Workday Human Capital Management (HCM. SNG will now operate on the unified and intelligent Workday platform, designed to scale alongside the organisation and its social mission. [...] About Workday  \n Workday is the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents.Workday unifies HR and finance on one intelligent platform with AI at the core to empower people at every level with the clarity, confidence, and insights they need to adapt quickly, make better decisions, and deliver outcomes that matter. Workday is used by more than 11,500 organizations around the world and across industries – from medium-sized businesses to more than 65% of the Fortune 500. For more information about Workday, visit workday.com.\n\n© 2026 Workday, Inc. All rights reserved. Workday and the Workday logo are registered trademarks of Workday, Inc. All other brand and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of their respective holders. [...] SNG’s transformation reflects the power of the Workday partner ecosystem. Workday’s transformative technology combined with PwC’s deployment expertise enabled an efficient rollout that delivered business value without disruption.\n\n“Moving our core HR and finance operations to Workday is a huge step forward for our organisation,” said Kevin Ives, chief information officer, SNG. “Working hand-in-hand with PwC and Workday, we have successfully delivered this crucial first phase of our transformation. We now have a robust, unified system that vastly improves the daily experience for our colleagues, providing us with the sturdy groundwork required to evolve and better serve our communities.”",
      "score": 0.83710164,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://blog.workday.com/en-us/creating-employee-first-digital-experiences-pvh-corp.html",
      "title": "Creating Employee-First Digital Experiences at PVH Corp. | Workday US",
      "content": "Categories\n Analytics & Insights\n Application Development\n Artificial Intelligence\n Contract Management\n Customers & Community\n Finance\n Human Resources\n Medium Enterprise\n Planning\n Procurement\n Security & Trust\n Technology Innovation\n Workday News & Culture\n Industries\n Financial Services\n Government\n Healthcare\n Higher Education\n Hospitality\n Media and Entertainment\n Nonprofit\n Professional and Business Services\n Retail\n Technology\n Podcasts\n Videos\n Authors\n\nLanguage Selection [...] ### What Are the Biggest HR Challenges of 2026?\n\n  From boosting retention to reskilling the workforce to building trust in AI, these are the top challenges facing HR leaders in the year ahead.\n\n   \n\n  Blaise Radley [...] The Future of Restaurant Management: A View From 2025\n\nLearn how restaurants can operate with agility by bridging the front and back office into a cohesive, data-driven powerhouse for strategic insights.\n\nRead Report\n\nPosted in:   Customers and Community,   Human Resources\n\n Customers Retail\n\nMore Reading\n\n Man staring out of a window \n\n  Customers and Community Workday News and Culture\n\n  ### Honoring Service With Action: How Workday Supports Our Veteran Community\n\n  Discover how Workday is bridging the civilian opportunity gap for transitioning service members. From philanthropic investments and dedicated hiring programs to innovative skills translation technology, we’re empowering veterans to thrive in the modern workforce.\n\n   \n\n  Workday Staff Writers\n workday partner awards",
      "score": 0.5191075,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://kpmg.com/au/en/why-kpmg/clients/workday-finance-function-deakin-client-story.html",
      "title": "Deakin University transform their finance function",
      "content": "KPMG logo\nKPMG logo\n\nMore about Tech, data and AI\n\nMore about retail industry\n\nFinancial Reporting Centre\n\nIndustry & Sector perspectives\n\nWhy KPMG?\n\nAbout us\n\nGraduate & Student Careers\n\nFind your fit\n\nSubmit RFP\n\nYour search term was too short.\n\nSearch terms must include 3 or more characters.\n\n# Deakin University transform their finance function\n\nShare\n\nDeakin University video still\n\n## Creating a finance function for the future\n\nDeakin, a leading Australian university, with five campuses and 61,000 students, together with KPMG implemented Workday, to transform their finance function onto the cloud and create a platform for future growth.\n\n## Business challenges [...] ## The solution\n\nWith the help of the KPMG Powered Enterprise approach they achieved that with Workday Financials, a modern cloud platform.\n\nSince implementing Workday with KPMG, Deakin have a greater understanding of how they operate more effectively than they did in the past. Having a single source of truth for their finance data gives them greater efficiency, improved reporting, better visibility of transactions as they come in and how they flow through the business.\n\nVanessa Evans, Deputy CFO comments on the adoption of the new solution by staff and says ‘Feedback has been positive from staff, the user interface with Workday is very intuitive, it is very easy to use, as long as you can shop on the web you can use our finance system’.\n\nKerrie Parker\n\nCFO, Deakin University [...] ## Business challenges\n\nDeakin’s old finance system had been used for 8 years and many modifications had been made over that time, making it too hard to upgrade. They looked at what they needed in their finance function, the necessary changes to make and the technology solutions available.\n\nThey wanted to implement a finance system which would enable them to create a platform for the future.\n\nDeakin, with the help of KPMG, implemented Workday to modernise their finance function.\n\n## The journey\n\nHear Kerrie Parker, CFO, Deakin University, Vanessa Evans, Deputy CFO and Paul Harper, Program Director on challenges they faced, their journey to the cloud and benefits they have seen since implementing Workday using the KPMG Powered Enterprise.\n\n## The solution",
      "score": 0.2424257,
      "raw_content": null
    },

    {
      "url": "https://kpmg.com/xx/en/what-we-do/services/law/digital-gateway.html",
      "title": "KPMG Digital Gateway for Law",
      "content": "### International Business Reorganizations\n\nManaging complex cross-border restructurings within a controlled legal framework, IBR technology helps integrate legal and tax advisory to enhance execution efficiencies, maintaining clarity across entities and stakeholders.\n\n### Contract Lifecycle Management Services\n\nDigitizing contracting processes from drafting to renewal within a shared global platform, Contract Lifecycle Management Services enhance consistency, support collaboration and help reduce cycle times across high-volume agreements.\n\n### AI in Legal\n\nEmbedding configurable automation and Gen AI capabilities within defined legal workflows, we’re investing in AI to help drive decision-making and accelerate outcomes, helping you navigate complexity at speed and with ease. [...] Designed for the demands of tomorrow’s legal function, KPMG Digital Gateway for Law simplifies compliance, sharpens decision-making and surfaces real-time insights with the rich data you already own — connecting legal capabilities with infinite possibilities, all from a single cloud-based platform.\n\nPowered by Microsoft Azure and our investment in machine learning, powerful visualizations and AI-driven analytics, the platform combines the knowledge of our global advisory organization with the full suite of KPMG firms’ services to help unlock the tools you need to unify data, streamline workflows and respond to legal matters with confidence. [...] ### Enhance efficiencies with speed and scale\n\nDeploy automation and Gen AI-enabled agents within defined process frameworks, enhancing execution and freeing teams to focus on more strategic priorities.\n\n## A single ecosystem for your legal needs\n\nWith purpose-built modular services unified in one powerful environment, KPMG Digital Gateway for Law helps reimagine coordinated delivery with an experience tailored to your legal needs.\n\n### Global Entity Management\n\nCentralizing subsidiary governance across jurisdictions through collaborative workflows and structured reporting, GEM connects local compliance with global oversight, providing transparency across group structures.\n\n### International Business Reorganizations",
      "score": 0.038354453,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://kpmg.com/xx/en/our-insights/ai-and-technology/asia-pacific-ai-adoption-advantage.html",
      "title": "Asia Pacific moves from AI adoption to AI advantage",
      "content": "### Talent as a multiplier\n\nCompanies are mindful of the advantages of having the right workforce. Globally, firms that are confident in their talent pipeline are four times more likely to report meaningful business value from AI—77 percent versus 20 percent.\n\nIn ASPAC, 62 percent of firms are upskilling or reskilling their current workforce; 56 percent are hiring for new AI-specific roles — such as AI architects and prompt engineers, and the like. At the same time, 56 percent are also hiring for new AI-specific roles. The skills most in demand among companies are not purely technical, however, and include skills such as critical thinking, adaptability and creative reasoning. [...] A key area of focus going forward is human-AI integration. India leads on this front in the region, with four in five firms making strong progress toward a fully integrated AI-human workforce, against a global average of 60 percent.\n\nKPMG’s AI Pulse Survey shows that contrary to a commonly espoused view that companies are struggling to hire for the right roles in an AI environment, most companies (70 percent) in ASPAC are confident that their current talent pipeline can meet the needs of an AI-enabled workforce.\n\n### Some concerns to address [...] KPMG refers to the global organization or to one or more of the member firms of KPMG International Limited (“KPMG International”), each of which is a separate legal entity. KPMG International Limited is a private English company limited by guarantee and does not provide services to clients. For more detail about our structure please visit \n\nMember firms of the KPMG network of independent firms are affiliated with KPMG International. KPMG International provides no client services. No member firm has any authority to obligate or bind KPMG International or any other member firm vis-à-vis third parties, nor does KPMG International have any such authority to obligate or bind any member firm.",

  "results": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.workday.com/en-au/elevate-new-zealand/agenda.html",
      "title": "Elevate New Zealand | Agenda | Workday Aus & NZ",
      "content": "Vice President oCHRO Product Marketing, Workday\n\nJo-Anne Ruhl\n\nNicole Watston\n\nSenior Manager, Solution Consulting, Workday\n\nJoin us for lunch at the Workday World Expo and discover a world of possibilities. Explore interactive demos, engage with industry leaders and connect with fellow attendees while enjoying a delightful meal. This is your chance to fuel your body and mind in the centre of innovation.\n\nThis session will present a point of view that the AI era is fundamentally a Human Design Era, where sustainable value comes not from deploying new tools but from redesigning how work, people and technology interlock. [...] Guillem Bonavia\n\nChief Financial Officer, Shuttlerock\n\nAs AI moves from experiment to core infrastructure, CIOs are the primary architects of the machine-human workforce. This keynote sets the stage for the IT track, exploring how Workday’s open, AI-native platform eliminates technical debt by unifying the enterprise’s two most critical data sets: People and Money. We move beyond the hype to show how an open architecture allows IT leaders to stop simply maintaining systems and start orchestrating intelligence—creating a flexible digital backbone that turns raw data into measurable business agility.\n\nShan Moorthy\n\nShan Moorthy\n\nChief Technology Officer, Asia Pacific, Workday [...] This session will unveil a vision for a New Work Day for HR—a fundamental shift from systems that simply track work to those that actively enable it through Agentic HR.  \n  \nGrounded in three core imperatives, this strategy demonstrates how Workday’s Enterprise AI platform reinvents core HR with trusted AI, delivers a new level of business value, and builds for the future through a unified, AI-driven architecture.  \n  \nBy leveraging Workday’s unparalleled context—encompassing 75 million users and 20 years of experience—HR leaders can now deploy specialised agents across payroll, recruiting, and performance to eliminate \"talent trapped in trivia\" and allow their teams to lead with empathy and creativity.\n\nJo-Anne Ruhl\n\nKaty Colletto\n\nVice President oCHRO Product Marketing, Workday",
      "score": 0.7274535,
      "raw_content": null
    },

    {
      "url": "https://en-gb.newsroom.workday.com/2026-04-28-SNG-Deploys-Workday-to-Transform-HR-and-Finance-Operations-and-Accelerate-Community-Impact",
      "title": "SNG Deploys Workday to Transform HR and Finance Operations ...",
      "content": "About Workday  \n Workday is the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents.Workday unifies HR and finance on one intelligent platform with AI at the core to empower people at every level with the clarity, confidence, and insights they need to adapt quickly, make better decisions, and deliver outcomes that matter. Workday is used by more than 11,500 organizations around the world and across industries – from medium-sized businesses to more than 65% of the Fortune 500. For more information about Workday, visit workday.com.\n\n© 2026 Workday, Inc. All rights reserved. Workday and the Workday logo are registered trademarks of Workday, Inc. All other brand and product names are trademarks or registered trademarks of their respective holders. [...] LONDON, UK, April 29, 2026 – Workday Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, today announced that SNG (Sovereign Network Group)  has successfully deployed Workday Financial Management and Workday Human Capital Management (HCM. SNG will now operate on the unified and intelligent Workday platform, designed to scale alongside the organisation and its social mission. [...] This press release contains forward-looking statements including, among other things, statements regarding Workday’s plans, beliefs, and expectations. These forward-looking statements are based only on currently available information and our current beliefs, expectations, and assumptions. Because forward-looking statements relate to the future, they are subject to inherent risks, uncertainties, assumptions, and changes in circumstances that are difficult to predict and many of which are outside of our control. If the risks materialize, assumptions prove incorrect, or we experience unexpected changes in circumstances, actual results could differ materially from the results implied by these forward-looking statements, and therefore you should not rely on any forward-looking statements.",
      "score": 0.5428881,
      "raw_content": null
    },

      "url": "https://www.workday.com/en-hk/products/adaptive-planning/overview.html",
      "title": "Adaptive Planning: Enterprise Planning Software (EPM) - Workday",
      "content": "# EPM Software\n\nUnlock limitless decision intelligence.\n\nFuel your next era of growth by keeping your brightest minds focused on strategy instead of manual workarounds—and discover why more cloud customers trust Workday Adaptive Planning than our largest competitors, combined.\n\nPlay Video (3:02)   Learn More\n\n \n\n### Make smarter decisions with AI-powered  planning.\n\nAnticipate what’s next.\n\nDrive smarter outcomes with AI-powered intelligence, backed by human-in-the-loop governance and grounded in enterprise-wide data.\n\nScale your impact.\n\nOperationalize any data source with automated connections—no storage limits or performance lag—just AI-powered insights that grow with your business.\n\nNavigate with ease. [...] TrustRadius Workday Adaptive Planning Top Rated\n\nG2 Top Finance Products Workday Adaptive Planning\n\n## AI FOR WORKDAY ADAPTIVE PLANNING\n\n### Planning Agent\n\nFind out why over 100 customers trust the Planning Agent to drive smarter decisions with conversational, dynamic prompts.\n\nLearn More\n\n \n\n## PARTNER ECOSYSTEM\n\n### Workday Marketplace\n\nDiscover custom apps from our trusted partner ecosystem to solve frontline operational challenges.\n\nLearn More\n\n \n\nHubspot logo\n\n“With Workday Adaptive Planning, my team can complete a forecast cycle in 15-20% less time than before.”\n\n—Vice President of Financial Planning and Analysis\n\nRead Story\n\nOne platform for every plan and decision.\n\nConnect financial, workforce, and operational plans for a full view across your business.\n\n### Financial planning. [...] ### Financial planning.\n\nFlexible, AI-driven budgeting, scenario planning, and reporting let you plan, budget, and forecast with confidence.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Workforce planning.\n\nPlan for the skills you need today and tomorrow with flexible hiring plans that align finance, sales, HR, marketing, and IT.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Operational planning.\n\nCompanywide, collaborative planning and real-time data enable you to deploy the right resources to meet business goals.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Close and consolidation.\n\nStreamline close and consolidation tasks for more accuracy, transparency, and efficiency in your consolidation process.\n\nLearn More\n\n### Planning FAQs.\n\n### How quickly can Workday Adaptive Planning be deployed?",
      "score": 0.49963441,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.cio.com/article/4163021/samsung-galaxy-ai-for-business-productivity-meets-security.html",
      "title": "Samsung Galaxy AI for business: Productivity meets security | CIO",
      "content": "That’s where Galaxy AI for business comes in.\n\nAn illustration of a smartphone using the Circle to Search gesture on a coffee machine, with related results displayed on a webpage next to it.\n\nSamsung\n\n## Increase productivity throughout the workday\n\nA lot of AI value depends on whether it actually saves time during the workday. I’ve noticed that inefficiencies tend to show up in the same parts of the workflow: piecing together fragmented information (bonus points if it’s across different platforms!), figuring out what actually mattered in a meeting, losing time to research and source-checking, and identifying action items for your team.\n\nNone of it sounds particularly time-consuming on its own, but together, it can quietly add up to a meaningful amount of lost productivity. [...] If this sounds familiar, that’s because it is—and when it keeps happening across calls, chats, and teams, it eats up more of the workday than it should.\n\nThis is where Galaxy AI can cut down on that unnecessary back-and-forth:\n\nTLDR: Galaxy AI reduces communication delays by helping teams communicate across languages and spend less time revisiting calls or reworking messages, enabling them to stay clear, responsive, and aligned.\n\n## Keep AI on enterprise terms\n\nAn illustration of a smartphone displaying a folder containing documents, next to a cloud with a prohibition symbol and a toggle set to on.\n\nSamsung [...] Galaxy AI tackles those routine pain points in a few key ways:\n\nTLDR: Galaxy AI helps reduce routine bottlenecks, making day-to-day work more organized, efficient, and easier to move through.\n\n## Simplify communication across the business\n\nAn illustration of a smartphone displaying a language selection pop-up with English selected and Korean listed below, beside a webpage with text blocks.\n\nSamsung\n\nCommunication has a way of getting messy in ordinary, unremarkable ways. A call moves too quickly, and someone misses a key detail. A message needs to be translated, then rewritten so it still sounds natural. The one that gets me the most is reworking the same email draft over and over because the tone is somehow still off.",
      "score": 0.34979975,
      "raw_content": null
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.workday.com/en-gb/company/latest/events-webinars/elevate-emea.html",
      "title": "Discover your local Workday Elevate EMEA event | Workday UK",
      "content": "Elevate logo\nElevate logo\n\n## Title\n\n# Workday Elevate® EMEA\n\nIn 2026, we’re showcasing the AI-elevated future of work – and we’re bringing those cutting-edge insights to a city near you. Discover your nearest Workday Elevate event in EMEA below and sign up now for updates. If you’re interested in sponsoring Workday Elevate EMEA, we’d love to hear from you. Join us and be inspired by the new work day we’re creating, powered by our AI platform and superintelligence for work.       "url": "https://kpmg.com/xx/en/what-we-do/services/ai.html",
      "title": "You can with AI",
      "content": "### Building trust and confidence in AI-driven compliance\n\nYou can stay with stay connected with AI.\n\n### A prototype for agentic AI in public services\n\nYou can transform public services with AI.\n\n### Strengthen climate resilience with agentic AI\n\nYou can collect better data with AI.\n\n### Reducing language barriers and increasing inclusion\n\nYou can breakdown barriers with AI.\n\n#### Intelligent industries\n\nOur research provides a detailed blueprint for organizations across industries to harness AI’s potential value.\n\nOur research provides a detailed blueprint for organizations across industries to harness AI’s potential value.\n\n## Our people\n\nsteve chase\n\n###### Steve Chase [...] ## Our people\n\nsteve chase\n\n###### Steve Chase\n\nGlobal Head of AI and Digital Innovation KPMG International & Vice Chair – Artificial Intelligence & Digital Innovation\n\nKPMG in the U.S.\n\npriya-emmanuel\n\n###### Priya Emmanuel\n\nHead of Global aIQ Program and Regional AI Lead for America\n\nKPMG in the U.S.\n\nBenedikt Höck\n\n###### Benedikt Höck\n\nPartner, Head of AI, Strategy and Management Consulting\n\nKPMG AG Wirtschaftsprüfungsgesellschaft\n\nSimon Benson\n\n###### Simon Benson\n\nPartner in Charge – Energy, Mining & Property, Consulting\n\nKPMG Australia\n\nLogo\n\n###### Contact\n\n###### Contact\n\n###### Media\n\n###### Media\n\n###### Company\n\n###### Company [...] ### Agentic AI advantage: Unlocking next-level value\n\n### AI is helping revolutionize risk management\n\n## AI Services and Alliances\n\n##### Harness AI’s transformative potential to create real, lasting value with KPMG’s advisory solutions. Supported by our alliance partnerships with leading technology, data, and service providers, we bring the right capabilities together to help you move forward with confidence.\n\n## How we are helping clients with AI\n\nWatch the videos below to explore how KPMG Member Firms are helping clients with AI, from realizing value and building trust, to optimizing technology and jumpstarting their AI transformation.\n\nExplore the client stories below to discover how we are supporting clients in achieving their AI goals.",

      "url": "https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/document-management",
      "title": "Best Document Management Reviews 2026 | Gartner Peer Insights",
      "content": "Show More Details\n\nImage 26: Logo of Hyland OnBase\n### Hyland OnBase\n\nBy Hyland\n\n4.2\n\n(290 Ratings)\n\nOVERVIEW ALTERNATIVES\n\nOnBase provides a broad spectrum of turn-key industry and departmental solutions that are expertly\n\ntailored to meet specific business challenges. As an enterprise platform, OnBase has purpose-built\n\nintegrations and connectors to core industry LOB applications such as Epic and Workday, supporting\n\ncritical content and process solutions. With repeatable industry solutions, OnBase provides the\n\ncapability to intelligently automate your business processes so your team can focus on higher value\n\nwork without the need to build costly customized solutions. With business ownership of solutions,\n\nOnBase enables expansion beyond IT, delivering faster ROI.\n\nShow More Details [...] Software \n           Enterprise Agile Planning Tools \n           Integration Platform as a Service \n           AI-Augmented Software Testing Tools \n           View All \n\n       Artificial Intelligence   \n\n           AI Code Assistants (Transitioning to Enterprise AI Coding Agents) \n           AI Application Development Platforms \n           Generative AI Knowledge Management Apps/General Productivity \n           Artificial Intelligence Applications in IT Service Management (Transitioning to AI Applications in IT Service Management) \n           Conversational AI Platforms \n           View All \n\n       Cloud Computing [...] Doxis Intelligent Content Automation is an AI-powered content services platform designed to bridge and automate content across best-of-breed apps like SAP, Salesforce & Microsoft to deliver a contextualized content experience and a future-ready digital workplace. What’s inside: Composable and contextual AI to harness and disseminate hidden insights; cloud-native solution suites, e.g. Doxis Intelligent Purchase-to-Pay Automation, Doxis Content Bridge for SAP & Salesforce, Doxis Healthcare; in addition to easily configurable, custom content services applications, e.g. intelligent archiving, document management, workflow automation, contract management, HR, QM, invoice and order confirmation automation; and solutions for verticals like banking, healthcare, insurance, logistics, manufacturing",
